ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, ARIMA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's methodology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last modified */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecast entry */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Square Error */,
  "mape" REAL /* Mean Absolute Percentage Error */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value of the forecast model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metrics were created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_sessions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting session */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES forecasting_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-role association was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-role association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast entry being checked */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "issues_found" TEXT /* Details of any issues found during the check */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quality check was created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Current value of the indicator */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator value was last updated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the indicator was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the indicator was last updated */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the indicator value (e.g., percentage, dollars, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_indicators_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
